subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ2.11
question_html:
What is the name of the compound with formula Ti3(PO4)2?

A. Titanium phosphate

B. Titanium(II) phosphate

C. Titanium(III) phosphate

D. Titanium(IV) phosphate
examiners_html: 71% of candidates were able to name Ti3(PO4)2 correctly. The most commonly chosen distractor was titanium(III) phosphate.
